name: superpower-a
description: Adaptive Superpowers router with a risk-weighted planning depth gate.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive workflow routing with depth 0-4 risk gates
interface.longDescription: Adaptive Superpowers routing that preserves verification discipline for risky engineering work while skipping workflow ceremony for simple questions, status checks, file opens, and tiny local actions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use adaptive workflow routing with the Planning Depth Gate. Keep low-risk tasks terse and escalate only when scope, risk, unknowns, blast radius, or reversibility justify more process.
